titles.title: Jehovah Elohim The Most High God

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v1 v2 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jehovah Elohim The most high God Jehovah Rapha The Lord my healer Jehovah Adonai My sovereign master Jehovah Nissi The Lord my Banner

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And I will lift You high High above the earth And I will lift You high High above the earth

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I will lift You high High above the earth Jehovah Shammah The Lord is here

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I will lift You high High above the earth Jehovah Shammah The Lord is here Jehovah Shammah The Lord is here
